My name Is Maddy Moona,
And today 'm Turning five.
Dad promised | could choose a pet,
A real one! Something live!
Well travel across the whole wide world,
Searching Mali through Tibet,
Until we find the pertect one...
Oh, | know just what Ill get!

| need a beast to tame my brother.
With teeth, sharp claws and a roar.
A LION! | could feed it Billy biltong..
Yes! A lion would settle the score.
But... a lion has a huge appetite.
Skinny Billy won t satisty.
And once Brutus has a taste for us Moonas,
he ll see me as Maddy stir-fry.

Dad thinks | should choose a cuddlier pet.
My parents are so hard to please.
They want me to have a pet | can hug.
A python? A python has squeeze.
But... if Snakey develops too much of a crush,
he ll suffocate me with affection.
To be honest, | just can't marry a snake!

No, reptiles arent the way to go.
| definitely need something taller.
A giraffe would be awesome. I'l slide down
her neck,
and think up a long name to call her.
But... something more than eight foot tall is
no good.
Our house has a rather low ceiling.
I'd spend hours massaging cricks out her neck.
My fingers would lose all their feeling.

None of these are the perfect pet!
Oh what, oh what will | get?

Those animals just don't work.
None are my perfect partner in crime.
| want something with fur, a pet who will follow.
Oh wait! | know — a canine!

My Bandit is the biggest bark on the block!
He's the fastest pup in the west!
Nothing can stop us. Not Billy nor bedtime.
love my Bandit. He's my best!
